title: AI Space Explorer
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a cinematic space exploration scene.
positive_prompt: Elite intergalactic explorer, advanced futuristic astronaut, standing on an alien planet, breathtaking cosmic landscape, stars, galaxies and colorful nebulae in the sky, cinematic science fiction lighting, highly detailed space suit, realistic face, exploration mission atmosphere, premium movie production quality, photorealistic, ultra detailed, sharp focus, epic adventure scene
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, distorted face, deformed body, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, low detail, broken helmet, poor lighting, noise, pixelated, horror elements, unrealistic proportions, cropped subject
